name: House of Five Leaves
overview: Rônin Akitsu Masanosuke is a skilled swordsman, but his personality often causes him to be let go from his job. One day he encounters Yaichi, the leader of a group calling itself "Five Leaves" and takes a job from him as a bodyguard. Though he is worried about their intentions, he feels there is something more to the group and agrees to work with them.

trailers.title: Sarai-ya Goyou (House of Five Leaves) Anime Teaser Trailer
